info.title: Loyalty Program API
info.description: E-commerce Loyalty Program API with event-driven architecture for achievements, badges, and rewards

post.description: Authenticate user with email and password, returns JWT token
Process a payment for a product and award cashback points

product_id.description: ID of the product to purchase

get.description: Retrieve the current user's payment history
Retrieve the current user's total spending amount
Retrieve a list of all available products
